findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 41. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: The PDF uses a three-column layout (Time, Topic, Presenter) without visible table borders, but the HTML renders this as a formal bordered table. While the data is preserved, the original layout was a free-form agenda, not a bordered table.
findings.evidence: PDF shows time slots on the left, topics in the center, and presenters on the right without any table borders or grid lines. HTML renders this inside a bordered table with headers 'Time', 'Topic', 'Presenter'.

findings.description: The PDF does not present the agenda as a table with headers; the HTML converts the agenda items into a table with fabricated column headers 'Time', 'Topic', and 'Presenter'.
findings.evidence: The PDF uses a formatted list layout with time ranges, topics, and presenter names. The HTML wraps these into a <table> with <thead> containing 'Time', 'Topic', 'Presenter' headers that do not exist in the source PDF. However, all data content is accurately represented.

findings.description:
The document has nested
elements, and the heading hierarchy uses h1 for 'AGENDA' and h2 for the full meeting title, which is acceptable, but the subtitle structure combining the committee name with
tags in h2 is a structural choice. More notably, there are no further heading levels used for the agenda items, which is consistent with the PDF.
findings.evidence:
HTML has

AGENDA

and

NEUSE RIVER BASIN HYDROLOGIC MODEL
TECHNICAL REVIEW COMMITTEE
MEETING

. The PDF has 'AGENDA' as a title and the committee/meeting name as a subtitle. This is acceptable.

findings.description: The HTML has nested <main> elements, which is invalid HTML structure but does not cause content duplication.
findings.evidence: The outer <main> wraps the entire content, and an inner <main> wraps the table. This is a structural issue but no content is duplicated.
